ol.li: Centroids: Strictly fixed at 256 for $2^8$ bit packing (uint8).
Subspaces (M): Product Quantizer config must ensure $D \pmod M = 0$.
Memory Alignment: Sub-buffers use 32-byte alignment for AVX-512 SIMD argmin.
ADC Path: Post-training, centroids are used to precompute Asymmetric Distance Computation tables.
